appflow.flow.sourceflowconfig.CfnAbout: Contains information about the configuration of the source connector used in the flow.

appflow.flow.sourceflowconfig.ApiVersion.Description: The API version of the connector when it's used as a source in the flow.

appflow.flow.sourceflowconfig.ConnectorP.Description: The name of the connector profile. This name must be unique for each connector profile in the AWS account.

appflow.flow.sourceflowconfig.ConnectorT.Description: The type of connector, such as Salesforce, Amplitude, and so on.
appflow.flow.sourceflowconfig.ConnectorT.Allowed values: Amplitude | CustomConnector | CustomerProfiles | Datadog | Dynatrace | EventBridge | Googleanalytics | Honeycode | Infornexus | LookoutMetrics | Marketo | Pardot | Redshift | S3 | Salesforce | SAPOData | Servicenow | Singular | Slack | Snowflake | Trendmicro | Upsolver | Veeva | Zendesk

appflow.flow.sourceflowconfig.Incrementa.Description: Defines the configuration for a scheduled incremental data pull. If a valid configuration is provided, the fields specified in the configuration are used when querying for the incremental data pull.

appflow.flow.sourceflowconfig.SourceConn.Description: Specifies the information that is required to query a particular source connector.
